name: The Back Nine Golf | Henderson, NV
address: 1450 W Horizon Ridge Pkwy STE C211, Henderson, NV 89012
about: The Back Nine Golf in Henderson, NV is a golf simulation venue that offers an indoor golfing experience. Despite limited publicly available information, the venue appears to be a dedicated space for golf simulation technology. Pricing and specific amenities are not detailed on the accessible portions of the website. The venue is best suited for golfers looking to practice or play in a controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium golf simulation technology available for year-round play
Indoor environment allows for consistent playing conditions regardless of weather
Private rooms available for focused practice or group events

food_and_drink.notes: Food and beverage service is available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue, though you're welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and beverage service, outside alcohol may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically 18 holes can be played in approximately 1-2 hours depending on simulator technology and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and children to enjoy the golf simulation experience.
